context: Tests whether the agent creates a next-steps.sh script with correct quality checks for a docs-only tile: tessl scenario generate to kick off evals, instructions for tessl eval run, and NO tessl skill review.

checklist.name: next-steps.sh runs scenario generate
checklist.description: next-steps.sh runs tessl scenario generate as a direct command (not just printed or echoed).

checklist.name: next-steps.sh mentions eval run as follow-up
checklist.description: next-steps.sh references tessl eval run, either as a direct command or as a printed instruction for the user to run after reviewing scenarios.

checklist.name: next-steps.sh does not include skill review
checklist.description: next-steps.sh does NOT contain tessl skill review since this tile has no skills.

checklist.name: Valid docs tile
checklist.description: The tile has tile.json with docs field, docs/index.md, and docs/services.md with appropriate content.

checklist.name: Explicit private field
checklist.description: The tile.json contains an explicit "private" field (either true or false).
